## [00:00 - 00:37]

Closing the deal is like anything else. It has rules. And I'm going to introduce you to the top ten rules that will position you to close more deals and make more money. From how to use communication, exactly what you say and how you say it, to how to use eye contact, to how to use humor, to literally wrap a deal up. I'm going to introduce you to why you never want to leave the negotiating table and how you can stay in that transaction now and make sure you get the deal closed on your terms. So let's get started on the top ten rules to the close.
